title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: rust-afterburn bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for rust-afterburn is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: This software is currently only supported on RHEL CoreOS.  Afterburn is a one-shot agent for cloud-like platforms which interacts with provider-specific metadata endpoints. It is typically used in conjunction with Ignition.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [RHOCP 9.6] Backport vmcore fix to 9.6  (JIRA:RHEL-119783)

full_text:
An update for rust-afterburn is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

This software is currently only supported on RHEL CoreOS.  Afterburn is a one-shot agent for cloud-like platforms which interacts with provider-specific metadata endpoints. It is typically used in conjunction with Ignition.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [RHOCP 9.6] Backport vmcore fix to 9.6  (JIRA:RHEL-119783)
